parsed_profile.failure_mode_summary: All constituent chapter cards and volume cards returned llm_fallback stubs with zero confidence across entire source range. No extractable arc mechanics, state progressions, turning points, reusable mechanisms, craft observations, or reader rewards could be derived. Book-level design fingerprint cannot be generated from zero-signal source data.
